patient.headline: You no longer need to keep everything in your head
patient.subheadline: Pillo tracks your medications — reminding you of every dose at the right moment. You focus on everything else.
patient.trustNote: Free · No account needed · iOS and Android

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to better health control

steps.title: Download Pillo
steps.description: No account, no email required. Download the app, open it — and you're ready to go. No steps to slow you down.

steps.title: Enter your medications
steps.description: Enter the name and dosage times. If you need help setting it up — a loved one can help.

steps.title: Pillo handles the rest
steps.description: You'll get a reminder at every scheduled time. One tap and you're done.

features.title: Clear and easy to read
features.description: Large text, clear buttons — everything visible at a glance. Designed so you never have to guess.

features.title: Reminds you if you miss it
features.description: If you don't respond right away, Pillo reminds you again. No nagging — it's just there.

features.title: Only what you need
features.description: No unnecessary features. Just your medications and your daily plan — in one place.

testimonials.quote: My daughter installed it and now I manage it myself. I've been taking my medication regularly for a month — before, something always slipped through.
testimonials.author: Krystyna Wójcik

testimonials.quote: Simple matter. I added 4 medications, set the times and it works. Doesn't require any technical knowledge from me.
testimonials.author: Stanisław Marek

testimonials.quote: My eyesight is poor so having it read aloud helps a lot. My grandson said it wasn't complicated — and he was right.
testimonials.author: Irena Kowalczyk

testimonials.quote: No need to register anywhere or come up with a password. That was my condition. I recommend it to older people.
testimonials.author: Halina Brzezińska

testimonials.quote: Tried three apps before this one. This is the only one I actually use every day. Simple and reliable.
testimonials.author: Franz Huber

testimonials.quote: I connected my account with my daughter and no longer need to report that I've taken my medication. Both of us are happy.
testimonials.author: Ryszard Dąbrowski

testimonials.quote: I'm 81 years old and I manage on my own. Big button, readable text, loud notifications. I don't need anything more.
testimonials.author: Elżbieta Kamińska

testimonials.quote: Complex schedule after treatment — Pillo handles it without a problem. Other apps got confused with more than 3 medications.
testimonials.author: Marta Lewandowska

testimonials.quote: The every-8-hours medication worked right after setup. The reminder repeats if I don't respond — that suits me perfectly.
testimonials.author: Bogdan Wiśniewski

testimonials.quote: Using it for 6 weeks. It's not perfect but it does what it's meant to and doesn't complicate life.
testimonials.author: Zofia Adamska

faq.question: Is Pillo free?
faq.answer: Yes — and it will stay that way. Pillo for patients is free with no hidden fees or time limits.

faq.question: Do I need to create an account and remember a password?
faq.answer: No. An account is created automatically on first launch — no email, no password. The app simply works.

faq.question: What if I don't respond to a reminder?
faq.answer: It's up to you. During setup you decide — whether Pillo should remind you once, or keep coming back every few minutes until the dose is checked off.

faq.question: Can I use Pillo without a caregiver?
faq.answer: Of course. Pillo works standalone — connecting with a caregiver is an option, not a requirement.

faq.question: What if I change my phone or reinstall the app?
faq.answer: If you use the app alone, the account is tied to the device and cannot be transferred. If you have a connected caregiver — they can help you restore access.

footer.headline: Pillo is almost ready
footer.sub: Leave your email — we'll notify you first when the app is available.

caregiver.headline: You no longer need to check — you just know
caregiver.subheadline: Pillo tracks your loved one's medications and alerts you when something needs your attention. Peace of mind you feel — not just claim.
caregiver.trustNote: 7 days free · Cancel anytime · iOS and Android

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Monitor your loved ones' health from anywhere

steps.title: Create an account
steps.description: Via Google, Apple or email — your choice. The whole process takes literally two minutes, and your data is secure from the first step.

steps.title: Connect with your loved one
steps.description: Generate a short code and send it via SMS or WhatsApp. Your loved one enters it in their app — and you're connected.

steps.title: Act only when needed
steps.description: Day to day — silence. When your loved one misses a dose — you get a notification. Nothing else requires your attention.

features.title: Notified only when something happens
features.description: We don't flood you with updates. We'll reach out when a medication wasn't taken and the response time has passed. Then — and only then.

features.title: The whole week at a glance
features.description: See what every day looked like — taken on time, late, missed. No calling, no asking. You simply know.

features.title: Full history for doctor visits
features.description: When you take your loved one to the doctor, you have a precise picture of the last few weeks. No guessing, no 'I think I took it'.

testimonials.quote: Mum is 76, always forgot. Now I can see in the app whether she took her medication and don't need to call every day to check.
testimonials.author: Agnieszka Zielińska

testimonials.quote: Set it up over the phone with my dad — took maybe 20 minutes. The dashboard is clear, alerts work.
testimonials.author: Piotr Kowalski

testimonials.quote: I have two connected people in one app. I check in once a day, see if everything's OK. That's all I need.
testimonials.author: Katarzyna Nowak

testimonials.quote: I use it professionally and personally for my dad. The app doesn't bombard you with alerts for every little thing — I really appreciate that.
testimonials.author: Dorota Wiśniewska

testimonials.quote: The weekly dose history shows whether my father has any pattern of skipping. That's more than any other tool gave me.
testimonials.author: Marek Jankowski

testimonials.quote: Dad has Alzheimer's. Instead of 3 calls a day I have one dashboard check. That's enough.
testimonials.author: Tomasz Krawczyk

testimonials.quote: Easy to set up, mum figured it out herself after the first walkthrough. Notifications come through quickly.
testimonials.author: Joanna Piotrowska

testimonials.quote: The missed dose alert comes immediately. Not in 2 hours — right away. That was the only thing I really needed.
testimonials.author: Anna Wojciechowska

testimonials.quote: The weekly chart gives a quick overview without diving into details. Useful when I don't have much time.
testimonials.author: Michał Szymański

testimonials.quote: Dad is skeptical about technology, but after a week he opens the app himself and presses the button. I didn't expect it to go so smoothly.
testimonials.author: Beata Mazur

faq.question: How much does the subscription cost?
faq.answer: 29.90 PLN per month or 9.99 PLN per week — your choice. You can start with the weekly option if you want to try it first.

faq.question: How many people can I monitor?
faq.answer: In the current version there is no limit — you can connect with as many people as you need.

faq.question: Does my loved one need to create a separate account?
faq.answer: They download the same Pillo app and go through a quick setup — no email, no password. Then you send them your code, they enter it and you're connected. That's it.

faq.question: Will I get a notification for every dose?
faq.answer: Only if you want to. You can choose: a notification when a dose is taken, only when something is missed, or just a daily summary — with no interruptions during the day.

faq.question: What exactly do I see as a caregiver?
faq.answer: You see everything — your loved one's full medication cabinet, every interaction with the app, weekly statistics and activity history. If something was missed, late or changed — it's in your view.

footer.headline: Peace of mind — coming soon
footer.sub: Leave your email — we'll notify you when Pillo for caregivers is ready.
